document.source_title: IPL 2026 schedule this week: Full list of matches, dates, timings, venues

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: A team in the IPL that is still alive in the playoff race.
entities.evidence_text: Still alive in the playoff race, Chennai Super Kings will host fellow top-four contenders Sunrisers Hyderabad.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A team in the IPL that is a top-four contender.
entities.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings will host fellow top-four contenders Sunrisers Hyderabad.

entities.name: Rajasthan Royals
entities.description: A team in the IPL aiming to revive their playoff hopes.
entities.evidence_text: Rajasthan Royals will aim to revive their playoff hopes after three consecutive defeats.

entities.name: Lucknow Super Giants
entities.description: A team in the IPL that has been eliminated from playoff contention.
entities.evidence_text: Rajasthan Royals will host already eliminated Lucknow Super Giants in Jaipur.

entities.name: Kolkata Knight Riders
entities.description: A team in the IPL facing an eliminated side.
entities.evidence_text: Kolkata Knight Riders will have a similar task at hand as they face another eliminated side, Mumbai Indians.

entities.name: Mumbai Indians
entities.description: A team in the IPL that has been eliminated from playoff contention.
entities.evidence_text: Kolkata Knight Riders will face another eliminated side, Mumbai Indians.

entities.name: Gujarat Titans
entities.description: A team in the IPL that is almost qualified for the playoffs.
entities.evidence_text: CSK will travel to face almost-qualified Gujarat Titans in Ahmedabad.

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bengaluru
entities.description: A team in the IPL that has already qualified for the playoffs.
entities.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad hosting the only team already qualified, Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

entities.name: Punjab Kings
entities.description: A team in the IPL looking for a miracle after consecutive defeats.
entities.evidence_text: Punjab Kings will look for a miracle after six consecutive defeats.

entities.name: Delhi Capitals
entities.description: A team in the IPL that will play in the final league match of the season.
entities.evidence_text: KKR taking on Delhi Capitals in the final league match of the season at Eden.

events.event: Chennai Super Kings vs Sunrisers Hyderabad
events.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings will host fellow top-four contenders Sunrisers Hyderabad at the MA Chidambaram Stadium.

events.event: Rajasthan Royals vs Lucknow Super Giants
events.evidence_text: Rajasthan Royals will aim to revive their playoff hopes after three consecutive defeats as they host already eliminated Lucknow Super Giants in Jaipur.

events.event: Kolkata Knight Riders vs Mumbai Indians
events.evidence_text: A day later, Kolkata Knight Riders will have a similar task at hand as they face another eliminated side, Mumbai Indians, at Eden Gardens.

events.event: Gujarat Titans vs Chennai Super Kings
events.evidence_text: Then CSK will travel to face almost-qualified Gujarat Titans in Ahmedabad on Thursday.

events.event: Sunrisers Hyderabad vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru
events.evidence_text: Sunrisers Hyderabad hosting the only team already qualified, Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

events.event: Lucknow Super Giants vs Punjab Kings
events.evidence_text: Punjab Kings will look for a miracle after six consecutive defeats when they play LSG in Lucknow on Saturday.
The final double-header on Sunday will see MI hosting RR at Wankhede Stadium.

events.event: Kolkata Knight Riders vs Delhi Capitals
events.evidence_text: KKR taking on Delhi Capitals in the final league match of the season at Eden.
